manipulators.description: Left shift in hyper one-shot: tap = lock QWERTY
Left shift in hyper locked: tap = lock QWERTY
Backtick in QWERTY mode: send Escape
Right shift in QWERTY mode: tap = one-shot hyper, hold 0.5s = exit to Enthium
Right shift: tap = one-shot hyper, hold 0.5s = enter QWERTY
Right shift: tap to unlock hyper
